zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett IV是Ralph Bassett III和Miss Bigod的兒子，於大約1215年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1265年8月4日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安 哥吉拉 沙智 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett IV was born about 1215, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Ralph Bassett III and Miss Bigod. He had at least 1 son. He died on 4 August 1265, in Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett IVは約1215年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでRalph Bassett IIIとMiss Bigodの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1265年8月4日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャム アル サインツ ウィス スト ラウレンスで51歳で死去した。

ko.Battle Of Evesham, Evesham, Worcestershi: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 로렌스
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett IV(은)는 대략 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Ralph Bassett III(와)과 Miss Bigod의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 로렌스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Battle Of Evesham, Evesham, Worcestershi: эвешам алл сеинц вит ст ларенс, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett IV родился около 1215 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Ralph Bassett III и Miss Bigod. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 4 августа 1265 г. в местности эвешам алл сеинц вит ст ларенс, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
